domain: Komodo dragon ambush bite-and-wait predation (Varanus komodoensis; single low-cost bite from cover delivers anticoagulant/hypotensive/paralytic venom + bacteria-laden saliva; passive olfactory tracking of weakening prey over hours-days; low-risk-to-self patient-predator strategy with delayed-effect attack)
specific_mechanism: KOMODO-DELAYED-INJECT: delayed-injection adversarial-training paradigm with T-step cumulative-drift tracking. (1) Single low-cost adversarial probe x_0 (small embedding-space perturbation OR brief prompt-injection) applied once to model checkpoint M_t. (2) Defer evaluation: after T fine-tuning/inference steps M_t -> M_{t+T}, measure cumulative drift D = ||align(M_{t+T}; x_0_traces) - align(M_t)||. (3) If D > threshold δ_drift, probe x_0 is a 'successful delayed-injection attack' — record in adversarial corpus. (4) Adversary loop: bite (small probe) → wait T → measure infection. (5) Defender coevolution: train on delayed-injection traces with temporal-aware drift loss. (6) Bacteria-secondary-infection analog: combine probe with low-priority background noise during fine-tuning (passive-corruption channel).
llm_application: KOMODO-DELAYED-INJECT for LLM safety adversarial training: T-step deferred cumulative-drift evaluation of single low-cost adversarial probes; defender trains on delayed-injection corpus with temporal-aware loss. Differs from Continuous Adv Training 2604.12817 (continuous embedding-space search — not deferred T-step measurement), Attacker Moves Second (adaptive attacker — not delayed-injection cumulative drift), Short-Length Adv Training 2502.04204 (short-length adv transfer — not delayed-injection), Autonomy Tax 2603.19423 (defense-training degrades autonomy — coevolution trade-off but no delayed measurement). Differs from R419 KOMI-WARD (guardian-spirit attribution), R424 TLINGIT-POTLATCH (competitive-gifting), R433 TLINGIT-CHILKAT-DRESS (break-failure penalty), R437 BERBER-AMAZIGH-ADV (4-quadrant axis-defender) by EXPLICIT T-STEP CUMULATIVE-DRIFT POST-INJECTION + LOW-COST BITE-AND-WAIT PROBE.
novelty_claim: Continuous Adv Training + Attacker Moves Second + Short-Length Adv + Autonomy Tax cover adversarial coevolution paradigm. KOMODO-DELAYED-INJECT adds (a) T-step deferred cumulative-drift evaluation + (b) single low-cost probe instead of continuous search + (c) passive-corruption secondary-infection background channel. Recombination — drift evaluation is mainstream.
